original_prompt: Please very carefully read this entire transcript from beginning to end and then create a comprehensive summary, every possible CRM field, all follow-up action items, a polished email, a list of attendees, a list of topics, and anything else that might be useful for investor relations. Please do not miss anything and please make it extremely professional and detailed even if some of the details are repeated in different parts of the transcript.

I want you to research this company using all of the documents and tell me everything important for a meeting, including people, history, opportunities, risks, questions, relationship context, likely decision makers, possible objections, possible next steps, and anything else that senior investor-relations staff might want to know before the meeting. Please make the answer broad, detailed, and useful.

Can you look at these CRM records and very carefully tell me if anything is missing, duplicated, incorrectly formatted, vague, inconsistent, not ready to sync, or likely to create a data-quality issue later, and then explain what fields should be fixed before syncing and what the analyst should review manually before sending the records to the cloud CRM export table.
